messages.content:
Dear Agoda
My wife and I were recently guests at the ABC resort for three days last week. We did our own research before deciding and your website is beautifully presented with wonderful photos of the resort and there were several positive reviews on the web which helped us make our final choice and decision. 

We were reassured at the time of the booking that we were going to be placed in one of the newly renovated rooms on the quiet side of the hotel. Upon check in, we were told that due to an unexpected overbooking, we had to be moved to another room - room number 304 and that should something free up during our stay, we would be able to move if we wish to. The room was certainly one of the older unrenovated rooms located near the bar and during our stay we heard music until late night in the evening including occasional rowdy partygoers. The room itself was also really quite dirty and seemed to have been unused for quite some time. There was a constant damp and mold-like smell in the room that gave my wife a headache. 
After the first night we complained, we were assured that we would be moved into another room but each day went by with no rooms available for us and we ended up staying in the same room for the rest of our state. The entire experience ruined our entire vacation and we will never go back to that hotel nor recommend it to any of our friends. We would like a refund for our whole period of stay. We feel that we were completely misled by your website booking process and the reviews posted on your website. 
Awaiting your prompt reply.
Yours sincerely,
Adam Raol
Please draft an email response to the customer and your email should include, but not be limited to the following elements: Request supporting documents, offer 50% refund,  and offer 10% compensation for next booking.

Dear Mr. Raol,

Thank you for reaching out and sharing the details of your recent stay at the ABC resort. I sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you and your wife experienced during your visit. It is our goal to ensure that our customers have a pleasant experience, and I regret that we fell short in your case.

To address the issues you faced, I would like to offer a 50% refund for your entire stay at the resort. We understand that the room you were placed in did not meet your expectations, and the disturbances you encountered were unacceptable.

Additionally, as a gesture of goodwill, we would like to offer you a 10% discount on your next booking through our platform. This discount can be applied to any future reservation you make with us, and we hope it can serve as a small compensation for the inconvenience.

To proceed with the refund and discount offer, could you please provide us with any supporting documents you may have, such as your booking confirmation or receipts? This will help us expedite the process. You can send these documents directly to our customer support email.

Once again, I apologize for the disruptions you experienced. We value your feedback, and I assure you that we are taking steps to prevent similar issues in the future. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
Agoda Customer Support Team
ok can I ask you what kind of documents are required to be submitted, for this case?
Thank you for contacting us. This was 000. Is there anything else we can assist you with? Have a great day!
Yes, I have an additional question。 Can you please clarify what kind of documents are required to be submitted for this case?

Hello Mr. Raol,

Thank you for reaching out once again. I understand you need further clarification on the documentation required for processing your refund and compensation request regarding your recent stay at the ABC resort.

To proceed, we kindly ask you to provide:
1. A copy of your booking confirmation email.
2. Any receipts or invoices related to your stay.
3. Photographic evidence, if available, that highlights the issues you faced with the room or any disturbances you encountered.

These documents will help us verify the details and expedite the refund process. You can send them directly to our customer support email address, and we will ensure that your case is handled promptly.

Please let us know if you need any more information or assistance. We are here to help and want to resolve this matter to your satisfaction.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
Agoda Customer Support Team
ok noted with thanks. I'll share you details as soon as possible
(System: Email consultation ended) This was Agent 000. Have a nice day. [Survey Link]

summary.main_inquiry: Request for refund and compensation for unsatisfactory hotel stay
key_responses: Offer 50% refund for the entire stay
Request for supporting documents (booking confirmation, receipts, photographic evidence)

customer_characteristics.cultural_hints: Western cultural context inferred from direct communication style and reference to recommendations

summary.summary: The customer, Adam Raol, expressed dissatisfaction with their stay at the ABC resort, citing issues with room allocation and cleanliness. They requested a full refund, feeling misled by the booking process. The agent offered a 50% refund and a 10% discount on a future booking, requesting documents for verification. The customer accepted the response and agreed to send the necessary documents.
